name: pyftype

metadata.name: pyftype
classifiers: Topic :: Software Development :: Libraries :: Python Modules

documentation:
# pyftype

```{image} https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/pyftype?style=for-the-badge
:alt: PyPI
:target: https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/pyftype?style=for-the-badge
```

```{image} https://img.shields.io/pypi/pyversions/pyftype?style=for-the-badge
:alt: PyPI - Python Version
:target: https://img.shields.io/pypi/pyversions/pyftype?style=for-the-badge
```

```{image} https://img.shields.io/pypi/l/pyftype?style=for-the-badge
:alt: PyPI - License
:target: https://img.shields.io/pypi/l/pyftype?style=for-the-badge
```

```{image} https://img.shields.io/pypi/status/pyftype?style=for-the-badge
:alt: PyPI - Status
:target: https://img.shields.io/pypi/status/pyftype?style=for-the-badge
```

```{image} https://img.shields.io/pypi/dw/pyftype?style=for-the-badge
:alt: PyPI - Downloads
:target: https://img.shields.io/pypi/dw/pyftype?style=for-the-badge
```

一个类型检测库。

## 特性

1. 类型检测完全模块化，需要检测新的类型，直接参考modules中的检测，编写即可。
2. 主要面向逆向工程方向的类型检测，也支持一般类型检测。

## 安装

```
❯ pip install pyftype

❯ pyftype -h
usage: pyftype [-h] [-V] p

positional arguments:
  p              path

options:
  -h, --help     show this help message and exit
  -V, --version  show program's version number and exit

❯ pyftype Makefile
File extension: txt
File MIME type: application/txt
```

## 用法

```python
import pyftype

# file
f = open(path, "rb")
data = f.read()
kind = pyftype.guess(data)

# path
kind = pyftype.guess(path)

# bytes
buf = bytearray([0xFF, 0xD8, 0xFF, 0x00, 0x08])
kind = pyftype.guess(buf)
```

具体参考examples目录

## 参考

- <https://github.com/h2non/filetype.py>
- <https://github.com/kin9-0rz/cigam>

documentation: 从文件中读取前262个字节。

functions.name: pyftype._match
documentation:
类型匹配

Args:
    obj: path to file, bytes or bytearray.

Returns:
    Type instance if type matches. Otherwise None.

Raises:
    TypeError: if obj is not a supported type.

functions.name: pyftype.guess_apk
documentation: 判断zip是不是APK文件

functions.name: pyftype.guess_text_and_data
documentation:
判断是否文本文件还是二进制数据文件
\:rtype: Type

functions.name: pyftype.guess
documentation:
判断文件类型

Args:
    obj: path to file, bytes or bytearray.

Returns:
    The matched type instance. Otherwise None.

Raises:
    TypeError: if obj is not a supported type.

functions.name: pyftype.guess_mime
documentation:
Infers the file type of the given input
and returns its MIME type.

Args:
    obj: path to file, bytes or bytearray.

Returns:
    The matched MIME type as string. Otherwise None.

Raises:
    TypeError: if obj is not a supported type.

functions.name: pyftype.guess_extension
documentation:
Infers the file type of the given input
and returns its RFC file extension.

Args:
    obj: path to file, bytes or bytearray.

Returns:
    The matched file extension as string. Otherwise None.

Raises:
    TypeError: if obj is not a supported type.
